title: Sick leave extension review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to distinguishing a sick-leave certificate from a supporting medical report without validating either.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports recording that an issued sick-leave certificate or related medical report is being submitted for employer-facing attestation and distinguishes sick leave, companion leave and medical reports without establishing clinical incapacity.

source.title: Attestation of Medical Leaves and Reports

exact_section.heading: About this service; required documents; target audience
exact_section.locator: official service page sections “About this service”, “Required documents”, and “Target audience”

investigations.text: Supports licensed-facility, competent-authority, issuance-to-attestation interval, duration-band and medical-committee approval context; it does not authorize automatic certification, backdating, duration selection, or diagnosis disclosure.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to documenting applicable duration-band and committee context only after clinician-entered dates and decisions exist.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports licensed-facility, competent-authority, issuance-to-attestation interval, duration-band and medical-committee approval context; it does not authorize automatic certification, backdating, duration selection, or diagnosis disclosure.

source.title: Attestation of Medical Leaves and Reports

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Original leave, issuing facility, diagnosis, current symptoms, function, assessment, dates, consent and employer context are unspecified.
No extension, duration, date, incapacity, fitness, legal entitlement or committee approval is inferred.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
